_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Advise on data protection implications of new projects, systems, and processing activities, ensuring privacy considerations are integrated into design and procurement decisions before processing begins.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Task SP-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-002 (SP, cosine: 0.478), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.477).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.426). Shared vocabulary: [design]. NICE-only terms [applications, develop, secure] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, advise, begins, considerations, data, decisions] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.875, R=0.847). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Design and develop secure applications" and "Advise on data protection implications of new projects, systems, and processing" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.500 > STS 0.426 (gap +0.074). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [design] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [design]. NICE-only: [applications, develop, secure]. WIDAI-only: [activities, advise, begins, considerations, data, decisions].
